## ERT1.1. Horizontal en route flight efficiency of the actual trajectory (KEA) (KPI#1)

The absolute value of the indicator has seen a slight deterioration with respect to 2024, but with an improvement with respect to 2023. For KEA, it went from 3.33% in 2023 to 3.29% in 2024 to 3.31% in 2025. For the corrected KEA, it went from 3.30% in 2023 to 3.25% in 2024 to 3.27% in 2025. This places France in 17^th^ position in terms of KEA and 25^th^ position in terms of KEA corrected (2025).

France is the State with the highest average additional internal distance (7.16 km per flight) and average total additional distance (16.4 km per flight).

In terms of overall contribution to the total additional distance in the SES area, which is 21.74% in 2025, France is the one contributing the most.
